title: Signoff: Packs infra + containers + other (03c, 03d, 03e)
description:
Run /plan-work-completion-signoff on these docs:
- docs/plans/03c-packs-infra-cloud.md → internal/packs/ (infra/cloud rules)
- docs/plans/03c-packs-infra-cloud-test-harness.md → guard/ tests, internal/eval/ tests
- docs/plans/03d-packs-containers-k8s.md → internal/packs/ (container/k8s rules)
- docs/plans/03d-packs-containers-k8s-test-harness.md → guard/ tests, internal/eval/ tests
- docs/plans/03e-packs-other.md → internal/packs/ (frameworks, etc.)
- docs/plans/03e-packs-other-test-harness.md → guard/ tests, internal/eval/ tests

For each doc: read the plan thoroughly, compare every specified type/interface/function/algorithm against the actual code, run tests, then add a Completion Signoff section. Report gaps to dcg-scheduler.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Completion signoff done for all 6 docs (03c, 03d, 03e + test harnesses). Committed as ba2048e. 03c: 0/75 rules (0%). 03d: 0/53 rules (0%). 03e: 2/41 rules (~5%). Builder DSL prerequisite not implemented. Test harness skeletons exist but all skip at runtime.
